dashboard.title: Crop Management (Vegetation Prime)

configPanel.credentialsHint: Leave blank to use platform credentials.

prescription.title: Prescription Maps
prescription.selectParcelHint: Go back to the list and select a parcel to export prescription maps.
prescription.exportDesc: Download the VRA prescription map in different formats.
prescription.noVraData: No VRA data. Run zoning first.

setup.autoMonitoringDesc: We will configure automatic satellite image downloads and weekly vegetation index calculations for this parcel.
setup.startDateHelp: We will search for Sentinel-2 images from this date. We recommend at least 21 days to ensure availability.
setup.shortRangeWarning: Sentinel-2 passes every 5 days. With clouds, images may not be available. We recommend at least 14-21 days.
setup.customIndexHelp: Configure the formula in Settings after activating.
setup.frequencyHelp: The system will check the satellite catalogue at this frequency; a new datum is only generated when the satellite passes and the scene is clear (Sentinel-2 ~5 days).
setup.activateDesc: By clicking "Activate", the system will begin to:
setup.activateStep1: Search for available historical satellite images.
setup.activateNote: Note: The initial process may take a few minutes depending on the selected date range. You will receive a notification when the data is ready.
setup.validationError: Invalid data (422). Check the console for more details.
setup.missingGeometry: Parcel geometry is missing. Cannot continue.

timeline.noDataAvailable: No data available for the selected period
timeline.noDataHint: Try a different index or date

analyticsPage.loginRequired: Please log in to view analytics.
analyticsPage.noParcelHint: Select a recently analyzed parcel below or use the map.
analyticsPage.inactiveMonitoringDesc: This parcel does not have automatic monitoring enabled. Set it up to download historical imagery and receive weekly updates.
analyticsPage.processingHistoricDesc: We are downloading and processing historical Sentinel-2 imagery for your parcel. This may take a few minutes.
analyticsPage.resolutionNoteDesc: For small entities (< 100m²), the Sentinel-2 index represents "Zonal Vigor" and not precise individual health.
analyticsPage.selectParcelForStats: Select a parcel to view statistics
analyticsPage.noAnomalies: No anomalies detected in the selected period
analyticsPage.noPredictions: No predictions available for this parcel
analyticsPage.customIndicesHint: Tick saved formulas to include them in the next analysis with NDVI, EVI, etc. They also appear as buttons in the map layer panel.
analyticsPage.customFormulaHelp: Use Sentinel-2 bands (B02…B12, B8A). Click a band to insert it into the formula.
analyticsPage.customTimeseriesNotAvailable: Timeseries for custom indices is not available yet.
analyticsPage.firstStepDesc: Assign a crop and start date to this parcel. The system will automatically search for satellite images.
analyticsPage.readyToAnalyzeDesc: The system will download the best available satellite image and calculate all vegetation indices.
analyticsPage.analysisNote: Sentinel-2 passes every ~5 days. Results depend on cloud-free image availability.

errors.noScenesFound: No satellite imagery available for these dates. Try a wider date range or wait for the next Sentinel-2 pass (every 5 days).
errors.noCredentials: Copernicus credentials not configured. Contact your administrator.
errors.noGeometry: This parcel has no geometry defined.

layerControl.selectParcel: Select a parcel to view layers

layerControl.noLayerLoaded: No layer loaded — run an analysis

layerControl.noSeasonHint: No active campaign yet. Create one in the parcel detail page.
layerControl.indexHint: Only indices with computed data are clickable. Run an analysis on the parcel detail page to add more.
layerControl.noDataYet: No data yet — open the detail page to launch an analysis

cloudCover.highWarning: High cloud cover - may affect accuracy

indices.gndvi: GNDVI - Green Normalized Difference Vegetation Index
indices.categoryNutritionDesc: Indices for nutrition and chlorophyll analysis
indices.categorySoilDesc: Indices for early stages and soil analysis

cropSeason.title: Configure Crop Season
cropSeason.monitoringDesc: Automatically download and process satellite imagery via STAC

timelineWidget.selectParcel: Select a parcel to view history

legend.ndviDesc: Normalized Difference Vegetation Index - Measures vegetation health and density
legend.eviDesc: Enhanced Vegetation Index - Reduces atmospheric and soil effects
legend.saviDesc: Soil-Adjusted Vegetation Index - Best for areas with exposed soil
legend.gndviDesc: Green Normalized Difference Vegetation Index - Sensitive to chlorophyll content
legend.ndreDesc: Normalized Difference Red Edge - Sensitive to crop stress and nitrogen
legend.ndmiDesc: Normalized Difference Moisture Index - Measures vegetation water content
legend.vraDesc: Variable Rate Application Zones - AI-clustered management zones

indexInfo.unavailable: Information not available for this index.

ndvi.description: The most widely used index for measuring vegetation greenness and health. Compares reflected light in visible red and near-infrared.

interpretation.veryLow: Water, snow, clouds, or bare soil
interpretation.veryHigh: Dense tropical forest or high-biomass crops

limitations: Affected by soil brightness in arid areas
Does not distinguish well between crop types

evi.description: Optimized to reduce atmospheric and soil influence, using the blue band for correction.

interpretation.low: Very sparse vegetation or bare soils

bestFor: Monitoring in high soil reflectance areas
limitations: Less sensitive in areas with low vegetation cover

ndmi.description: Detects changes in vegetation water content using infrared bands.
limitations: Affected by dense clouds and shadows
Does not discriminate between soil and vegetation water

savi.description: NDVI variant that minimizes soil brightness influence, ideal for young crops.
bestFor: Where soil is visible between plants
Vineyards and olive groves with wide spacing
limitations: Requires adjusting L factor by cover
Less sensitive than NDVI in dense covers

gndvi.description: Uses the green band instead of red, offering higher sensitivity to chlorophyll.
limitations: Green band (B03) has lower signal-to-noise ratio

ndre.description: Uses the Red Edge band, highly sensitive to subtle changes in vegetation health.
limitations: Requires Red Edge band (B05, B06, B7, or B8A)
Can be affected by canopy structure

parcelDetail.noParcelHint: Pick a parcel from the unified viewer or the parcel list.
parcelDetail.currentStateHint: Latest computed index across all analyses for this parcel.
parcelDetail.currentStateEmpty: No completed analysis yet for this parcel.
parcelDetail.cloudSkipTitle: Last scene was discarded due to clouds
parcelDetail.cloudSkipDetail: Clouds over the parcel were {{pct}}% (threshold {{thr}}%). Raise the tolerance or wait for a clearer scene.
parcelDetail.seasonsHint: Every analysis belongs to a crop season. Seasons cannot overlap on the same parcel.
parcelDetail.seasonsEmpty: No active crop season. Create one to start analysing this parcel.
parcelDetail.seasonEmpty: No analyses in this season yet.
parcelDetail.newSeasonHint: Pick a crop and a date range. Two seasons cannot overlap on the same parcel — pick non-conflicting dates.
parcelDetail.seasonDateOrder: End date must be on or after start date.
parcelDetail.seasonConflict: This season overlaps an existing one. Adjust the dates or remove the conflicting season.
parcelDetail.analyzeHint: Searches Sentinel-2 scenes inside the season window and dispatches one download job per dekadal window. Each download triggers index calculations for the selected indices.
parcelDetail.analyzeNoIndex: Pick at least one index to compute.
parcelDetail.deleteConfirm: Delete this job and its raster?
parcelDetail.deleteCascadeWarning: This will also delete every index calculated from the same scene.
parcelDetail.legacyHint: Older analyses created before crop seasons were mandatory. Safe to delete.
parcelDetail.advancedHint: VRA zoning, custom formulas and exports — for power users.
parcelDetail.vraHint: Splits the parcel into prescription zones based on the chosen index. Run this once you have a recent computed index for the parcel.
parcelDetail.customFormulasHint: Define your own band-based formula (e.g. (B08-B11)/(B08+B11) for NDMI). Custom formulas are tenant-wide and can be opted into per analysis.
parcelDetail.exportHint: Downloads the most recent VRA zoning result. Generate a VRA above first if you have not already.
parcelDetail.exportError: Export failed (a VRA result is required first).
